items.title: Ted Turner, media mogul who revolutionised TV news by launching CNN, dies at 87
items.summary: The media mogul pioneered the modern 24-hour news culture when he launched the Cable News Network in 1980.

items.title: CNN創辦人特納辭世享壽87歲　川普讚他是廣播史偉人
